programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Cross a river of muck as one home gets finished and a new job gets under way.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Debate a structural snag at the Suburban House and a business-busting curveball.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Learn about ensuite design and energy-efficient tech, and see a surprise finish.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Take shelter from Mother Nature, then prep for a make or break open house.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Get a lesson in choosing bold tile and enjoy a job well done at the River House.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Finish strong on the Country House and see if Mike and MJ turn a profit.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Cheer as Mike’s crew finishes up a stalled $20K kitchen reno in just one week.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Join the Holmes team as they help new parents keep their heads above water.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Cozy up to Mike’s fix for a geothermal system that’s freezing out a family.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Freeze out invading squirrels and cold drafts that a home inspector never found.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Inspect a rotten deck that a seller-provided inspection report didn’t disclose.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Total up the cost of leaks, rot, bad wiring, and more for a mother-daughter duo.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Say goodbye to clutter when two sisters get the Cretan oasis they’ve dreamed of.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Feel the love as a newlywed couple gets a Jamaican-inspired entertaining space.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Check in on a formal redesign, an ultra-steep makeover, and a recovery garden.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Welcome magic into a kid-friendly yard made for hanging out and hide-and-seek.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Race to shore up basement walls that are 66 percent weaker than they should be.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Get a load of a rotted-out balcony that only Mike’s team is willing to take on.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Say goodbye to a financial nightmare as Mike resolves some unfinished business.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Enjoy Mike’s rock-solid fixes for a rickety garden wall and an AWOL contractor.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Head up to the roof as Mike rebuilds an attic that’s missing a crucial support.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right
programme.desc: Watch Mike help a high school crew deliver a healing reno for a grieving family.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right
programme.desc: Take a look at Mike’s DIY do-over and some sign-language-friendly upgrades.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right
programme.desc: Bring independence home with Mike’s smart solution for a faulty wheelchair lift.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right
programme.desc: Reckon with a $100K dream upgrade that became an even costlier nightmare.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right
programme.desc: Creep up to a home’s sealed-off third floor to find the source of its problems.

programme.title: Holmes in New Orleans
programme.desc: Visit the bustling job site, then get a lesson in local wetlands preservation.

programme.title: Holmes in New Orleans
programme.desc: Race the clock as tech and landscaping go in and crew issues boil over…again.

programme.title: Holmes in New Orleans
programme.desc: Celebrate the happy result of weeks of hard work as Gloria finally comes home.

programme.title: Holmes 10th Anniversary Special: Behind The Overalls
programme.desc: Get a heartfelt look back at 10 years in the life of Canada’s construction guru.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Stay calm as financial setbacks push MJ into a make-or-break decision.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Cheer as the Holmes crew pitches in for a final push before the big reveal.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Watch sparks fly as the Holmeses hunt for houses and try to find equal footing.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Ponder a far-flung prospect and see H2O issues dry up the Country House budget.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Cheer as the walls go up on one project while structural issues sink the other.
